title: Template Pool
description: Used to pair block rules with Structure Templates and to randomly place Structure Templates using a weighted list.

elements.description: List of Structure Template and processor list pairs.

fallback.description: Fallback template pool to use if no element in the pool can be placed successfully.

description.title: Description
description.description: Metadata that identifies this template pool.

identifier.description: Identifier of the template pool. Used by Jigsaw Structures to assign processors to Structure Templates.

template_pool_element.title: Template Pool Element
template_pool_element.description: A grouping of a Structure Template, the Processor List to use when placing the structure, and its weight that determines the likelihood of the element being chosen.

element.title: Element
element.description: The element type and its configuration.

location.description: The path of the structure file. This path is relative to the behavior pack's structures folder.

processors.description: The identifier of the processor list to use when placing the structure.

projection.description: Specifies how structures should be placed relative to the terrain.

feature.description: The identifier of the feature to place.

weight.description: The weighted probability of choosing the element from the pool. For example, a template pool containing 2 structures with weights of 1 and 3 will have a 25% and 75% chance of being chosen respectively.
